DocumentObject.description:
Represents a regulatory filing or announcement fetched from BSE, NSE, or SEBI.

This is the canonical output of the document_fetcher scraper.
All fields are required unless noted. Phase 2 agents rely on these
field names and types — do not change them without a migration plan.

example.text: Reliance Industries Q3FY24: Revenue grew 15% YoY to ₹2.28 lakh crore...

source.description: Exchange or regulator that published this document.
source.title: Source

text.description: Full extracted text content of the document.
text.title: Text

url.description: Original URL of the document or PDF.
url.title: Url

ocr_used.description: True if Tesseract OCR was used (indicates scanned/image PDF).
ocr_used.title: Ocr Used

parse_confidence.description: Confidence score for text extraction quality. 1.0 = digital PDF. <0.8 = OCR only.
parse_confidence.title: Parse Confidence

DocumentObject.title: DocumentObject

NewsArticle.description:
Represents a news article fetched from financial news sources.

Sourced from: Economic Times, Mint, Moneycontrol, Business Standard
via NewsAPI (primary) or SerpAPI (fallback).

Phase 2 sentiment_agent expects all fields to be present.
Missing body text should be represented as an empty string, not None.

example.body: Reliance Industries on Friday reported a 10.6% jump in consolidated net profit...
example.headline: Reliance Industries posts record Q3 profit

body.description: Full article body text. May be truncated by NewsAPI free tier to ~200 chars.
body.title: Body

NewsArticle.title: NewsArticle

SocialPost.description:
Represents a social media post from Twitter/X or Reddit.

Sourced from:
- Twitter/X: cashtag mentions (e.g. $RELIANCE) via API v2
- Reddit: r/IndiaInvestments and r/DalalStreet posts

Engagement metadata (likes, comments) is used by Phase 2
sentiment_agent to weight post importance in the CSS calculation.

example.author: invest_guru_42
example.content: RELIANCE breaking out of long-term resistance. Expect 5-10% move. #DalalStreet

platform.description: Social platform the post was sourced from.
platform.title: Platform

post_id.description: Platform-native post ID (tweet ID or Reddit submission ID).
post_id.title: Post Id

content.description: Full text content of the post or tweet.
content.title: Content

author.description: Username or display name of the author.
author.title: Author

SocialPost.title: SocialPost
